experimental_design: we compared the activity scores between mutated USP7 (USP7mut) vs. wild-type USP7 (USP7wt) samples
factor_value: Our study unveiled the synergistic effect of USP7 haploinsufficiency
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
number_of_biological_replicates: we evaluated the predicted activities of TAL1-interacting transcription factors (TF) in 206 T-ALL transcriptomes
number_of_samples: we evaluated the predicted activities of TAL1-interacting transcription factors (TF) in 206 T-ALL transcriptomes
